programme.title: BKFC 62
programme.desc: Kai Stewart vs. Bryan Duran, featherweight title bout; Keith Richardson vs. Alberto Blas, championship bout; Jared Warren vs. Jomi Escoboza, light heavyweight title bout. From Hollywood, Fla.

programme.desc: From Colonial Life Arena, Columbia, S.C. on Nov. 3, 2023.

programme.desc: Jonathan Coachman hosts this no-holds-barred daily sports talk show. "The Coach" leads dynamic discussions with a rotating cast of all-star analysts and sports insiders.

programme.desc: New York's #1 combat sports promotion returns for Flex Fight Series 56: Mosh Pit live from HK Hall!

programme.title: BKFC 57
programme.desc: From Feb. 2, 2024. Featuring Austin Trout vs. Luis Palomino for vacant BKFC Welterweight Championship from Hollywood, Fla.

programme.desc: Alberto Blas vs. Ryan Reber, bantamweight championship; David Mundell vs. King Mo, light heavyweight. From Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino in Hollywood, Fla.

programme.title: BKFC 36
programme.desc: From Feb. 24, 2023. Features Alan Belcher vs. Arnold Adams for BKFC heavyweight championship, plus James Lilley vs. Bobby Taylor in bare-knuckle boxing action from Kenner, La.

programme.title: Epic Fighting 64
programme.desc: From Four Points Sheraton in San Diego.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: No. 5 ranked welterweight contender Neiman Gracie takes on the man with the most submission finishes in BELLATOR history, Goiti Yamauchi, in the main event from Sioux Falls, S.D. Aug. 12, 2022.

programme.desc: March 24, 2023. Features Reggie Barnett Jr. defending BKFC bantamweight title against Daniel Alvarez, plus Britain Hart vs. Jenny Clausius for BKFC women's strawweight title from Norfolk, Virginia.

programme.desc: April 21, 2023. Features Dat Nguyen vs. Daniel Straus, plus Jake Bostwick vs. Isaac Doolittle in bare-knuckle boxing action from Delray Beach, Florida.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: All the classic mixed martial arts and kickboxing action from Bellator, featuring some of the best fighters in the world.

programme.title: Bellator MMA

programme.desc: Ken Whiting explores the alligator-filled waters of the 438,000 acre Okefenokee swamp in Georgia.

programme.sub-title: Full Vintage Van Tour: Inside This Photographer's Ultimate Camper Van

programme.sub-title: Tucson, AZ: Desert Hotspots and Off-The-Beaten-Path Eats
programme.desc: Biju travels to Tucson, Arizona, seeking experiences from trendy hotspots to entirely off-the-beaten-path.

programme.title: The Paradise Paradox

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Teton County Search & Rescue races to save a teen who drove a snowmobile off a cliff.

programme.title: Ski A&E
programme.desc: In this episode we follow the Ski Patrol, and the contrast in weather brings a range of different emergencies.

programme.title: Life of Kai
programme.desc: With the first winter swell hitting Jaws, Kai looks to redeem himself after a loss in the Big Wave event.

programme.title: Life of Kai
programme.desc: Kai, Ridge and Ian Walsh fly to Mavericks in California for what's being hailed as the swell of the decade.

programme.title: Khanh Ong’s Wild Food
programme.desc: Chef Khanh Ong embarks through Central Gippsland Victoria also known as The Middle of Everywhere.

programme.desc: Alex Honnold heads to Nevada’s spookiest town, Tonopah, for ghosts, gems, and a haunted hotel.

programme.desc: Pro climbers Alex Honnold and Cedar Wright battle wind and a surprise snowstorm in Great Basin National Park.

programme.title: Descending

programme.title: PaddyO Sucks at
programme.desc: Watch bike-packer Ryan Van Duzer ruin bike riding for PaddyO.

programme.title: PaddyO Sucks at
programme.desc: Can veterans like Mirna Valerio and Brendan Leonard help PaddyO check “ultrarunning” off his bucket list?

programme.title: Natural Selection
programme.desc: Witness the evolution of freeskiing as the YETI Natural Selection Ski takes on the backcountry of Alaska.

programme.title: Beat Monday
programme.desc: Mike and Jason head to the Utah Desert to take on a variation of the Stone House Lands Bikepacking loop.

programme.title: Beat Monday
programme.desc: Mike and Jason head to Zion National Park to take on the world famous Moonlight Buttress.

programme.title: Beat Monday
programme.desc: Epic weekend adventures designed to push the boundaries of what's possible.
